Falsifiability / Test Handle: Measure gyromagnetic ratios of astrophysical bodies and test for universality; derive gravitational force from toroidal averages and compare with Newtonian values. 1.0.38 ID 137: Megastructure Formation Theorem Type: Theorem Formal Statement: Standing wave interference across the universe produces filaments with wavelength $λ$ = $π$ R_universe / n, where R_universe is the Hubble radius. For n of order unity, $λ ≈$ 150 Mpc. These filaments are flux tubes with Tš topology; the predicted cosmic web spacing matches observations.
